zh.Sudeley Castle, Sudeley Manor, Glouchest: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾素德勒 曼諾
zh.Ley, Weobley, Herefordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀福爾維奧布利
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Brydges於1493年3月9日出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾維奧布利時，他的父親James Brugge27歲，母親Anne Atwood35歲。他與Sibell Bromwich結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1567年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾素德勒 曼諾享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: Brydges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bridges
meanings: English: variant of Bridge . The -s generally represents the genitive case, but may occasionally be a plural. In some cases this name denoted someone from the Flemish city of Bruges (Brugge) in Belgium, meaning ‘bridges’, which had extensive trading links with England in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Brydges was born on 9 March 1493, in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, James Brugge, was 27 and his mother, Anne Atwood, was 35. He married Sibell Bromwich. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1567, in Sudeley Manor, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Brydges est né le 9 mars 1493, à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Brugge, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Anne Atwood, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Sibell Bromwich. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1567, à Sudeley Manor, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Brydges am 9. März 1493 in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Brugge 27 und seine Mutter Anne Atwood 35. Er hat Sibell Bromwich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1567 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Sudeley Manor, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Sibell Bromwich. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1567, nel Sudeley Manor, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Brydgesが1493年3月9日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウエオブリーで生まれた時，父James Bruggeは27歳，母Anne Atwoodは35歳であった。Sibell Bromwichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1567年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリー マノーで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Brydges(이)가 1493년 3월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 w오블리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Brugge(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Atwood(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Sibell Bromwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1567년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 수데리 먼어에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Sibell Bromwich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1567, em Sudeley Manor, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Brydges родился 9 марта 1493 г. в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени James Brugge было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Atwood, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibell Bromwich. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1567 г. в местности судели манор, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.
